subcodes.first_line: O ye who are intoxicated with the Wine of God! The Breeze of the Merciful is wafting from the rose-garden of Eternity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مخموران صهبای الهی نفحه رحمانی از ریاض باقی میوزد و صبح نورانی از افق معانی
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @music and singing, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @predictions and prophecies
